title: festuca rectifolia
intro: Festuca rectifolia, also known as rectifolia fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca rectifolia include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, reduce inflammation and pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Festuca rectifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
